title: Simple Clouds Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Simple Clouds' localized weather and other mods.
body: ## Due to a lack of time, I am no longer updating this mod This mod is an addon to [Simple Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-clouds/), adding compatibility with it's localized weather system to other mods that detect rain using traditional methods. ## **Supported Mods** Currently, it supports the following mods' blocks/mechanics: * [**Cyclic**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic): Growth enchant, Solar Generator, Weather Detector * [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries): Flammable Effect, Flammable Liquid (Lumisene), Wind Vane ## **Modpack Use** Feel free to include this mod in your own packs. Just don’t expect full support since I don’t mod Minecraft regularly.
